metadata.name: Docker Orphan Detection
metadata.description:
Ansible playbook to detect orphaned Docker resources and optionally push the report to Discord via webhook.

Project: https://www.docker.com
Documentation: https://docs.docker.com/reference/cli/docker/system/
metadata.author: Christian Lempa

variables.name: discord_enabled
variables.title: Enable Discord Webhook
variables.description: Send orphan detection summary to Discord webhook

variables.name: discord_message_prefix
variables.title: Discord Message Prefix
variables.description: Prefix line sent before report content
